nodes.name: Webhook

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `{ repository(owner: "${$json.repo.split('/')[0]}", name: "${$json.repo.split('/')[1]}") { discussions(first: 3, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title author { login } category { name } createdAt comments { totalCount } } } } }` }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `{ repository(owner: "${$json.repo.split('/')[0]}", name: "${$json.repo.split('/')[1]}") { discussion(number: ${$json.discussion_number}) { id title } } }` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `mutation { addDiscussionComment(input: { discussionId: "${$json.data.repository.discussion.id}", body: "${$('Parse Parameters').item.json.body.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, '\\n')}" }) { comment { id } } }` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `{ repository(owner: "${$json.repo.split('/')[0]}", name: "${$json.repo.split('/')[1]}") { discussion(number: ${$json.discussion_number}) { id number title body author { login } category { name } createdAt comments(first: 20) { totalCount nodes { id body author { login } createdAt } } } } }` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `{ node(id: "${$json.comment_id}") { ... on DiscussionComment { id body author { login } createdAt replies(first: 10) { totalCount nodes { id body author { login } createdAt } } } } }` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `mutation { addDiscussionComment(input: { discussionId: "${$json.discussion_id}", replyToId: "${$json.comment_id}", body: "${$json.body.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, '\\n')}" }) { comment { id } } }` }) }}
